hero.subtitle: Practice by text or voice with a tutor that corrects you instantly. Choose your topics, reinforce with repetition and track your real progress.
hero.freeTrialSuffix: with the text tutor. No credit card needed.

problem.title: Learning vocabulary in another language is hard
problem.subtitle: No matter how many apps you download or lists you save. Without real practice and feedback, vocabulary doesn't stick.

points.title: Too many words
points.description: There are thousands of words and you don't know where to start or which ones you actually need.

points.title: You forget fast
points.description: You memorize lists but forget them in days because you don't practice in context.

points.title: No visible progress
points.description: You study without knowing if you're actually improving or just repeating the same things.

points.title: No constant guidance
points.description: It's hard to stay consistent without someone to correct and motivate you.

solution.title: Meet your AI tutor
solution.subtitle: It's not a course or an app with random exercises. It's a smart conversation that guides you, corrects you and reinforces what you need to practice most.

highlights.name: Practice by writing
highlights.description: Translate words and phrases by typing. The tutor corrects you instantly with clear feedback and examples.

highlights.name: Practice with your voice
highlights.description: Speak with the tutor to practice pronunciation and fluency. Listen, repeat and improve every session.

highlights.name: Spaced repetition
highlights.description: Words you miss come back at just the right time so you memorize them long-term.

howItWorks.title: Start practicing in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated setup. Four steps and you're already learning.

steps.name: Choose your language
steps.description: English, Portuguese, French, German and Italian available today. Switch languages anytime without losing your progress.

steps.name: Select your topics
steps.description: Food, travel, work, casual conversations and more. Choose topics that fit your daily life and generate your vocabulary list.

steps.name: Practice with the tutor
steps.description: By text or voice, the tutor asks questions, evaluates your answers instantly and gives you clear corrections with examples and audio.

steps.name: Track your progress
steps.description: Check your streak, correct answers, errors, activity calendar and weekly ranking. Everything you need to see your real progress.

primaryFeatures.title: Everything you need to learn vocabulary

features.name: Your vocabulary organized

secondaryFeatures.title: This is what a practice session looks like
secondaryFeatures.subtitle: The tutor guides you step by step: asks a question, listens to your answer, evaluates and gives you feedback with examples and audio. All in a natural conversation.
secondaryFeatures.screenshotAlt: Practice session with the tlahtolli.ai AI tutor

subFeatures.name: Guided questions

subFeatures.name: Voice mode
subFeatures.description: Talk to the tutor using your microphone. Practice pronunciation in real time.

subFeatures.name: AI corrections
subFeatures.description: Every answer gets instant evaluation with clear feedback and examples.

subFeatures.name: Integrated audio
subFeatures.description: Listen to the correct pronunciation of each example to train your ear.

subFeatures.name: Hits and misses
subFeatures.description: The tutor records each answer so you can see your success rate and know what to reinforce.

subFeatures.name: Smart repetition
subFeatures.description: Words you miss come back until you master them.

personalization.title: Personalize your experience
personalization.subtitle: Adjust the language, voice and audio of the tutor so every session feels like yours.

cards.name: Select your language
cards.description: English, Portuguese, French, German and Italian available today. Switch languages anytime without losing your progress. More languages coming soon.

cards.name: Choose the tutor voice
cards.description: Each voice has a different personality and style. Choose from 8 options and switch whenever you want from settings.

cards.description: Enable automatic reading of the tutor's examples to train your ear while you practice by text.

testimonials.title: Users who trust us to learn
testimonials.subtitle: Our community shares their real experience: a simple way to practice, feel accompanied by AI and see measurable results over time. Nothing explains the product better than the stories of those who use it every day.

items.question: How does tlahtolli.ai work?
items.answer: You choose the topics that interest you, the system builds your vocabulary list and you practice in an AI-guided chat. The tutor asks questions, evaluates your answers instantly and gives you clear corrections with examples and audio.

items.question: Does the free trial include voice?
items.answer: When you create your account you get 5 days free with the text tutor, no card needed. Then, when you choose a plan, you get another 5-day trial with all the plan's features. If you pick Pro or Power, you'll have access to voice mode during that trial.

items.question: Do I need a credit card to start?
items.answer: No. You create your account and get 5 days free with the text tutor, no card needed. When you choose a plan, a payment method is required, but you'll get a 5-day free trial with all plan features before being charged.

items.question: Can I choose what to study?
items.answer: Yes. You select your topics (travel, work, food, etc.) and adjust the session. The system generates your list instantly and you can regenerate it whenever you want.

items.question: What languages are available?
items.answer: Today you can practice English, Portuguese, French, German, Italian and Náhuatl. You can switch languages anytime without losing your progress. More languages coming soon.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account. There's no lock-in or cancellation fees. Your access stays active until the end of the paid period.

items.question: Where do I see my progress?
items.answer: In the Statistics section: practice streak, success rate, activity calendar and weekly ranking by topics so you can see how you're advancing.

items.question: Is there a mobile app?
items.answer: For now tlahtolli.ai works on desktop browser. We're working on mobile support.

cta.title: Start practicing today
cta.subtitle: Create your account in seconds and get 5 days free with the text tutor. No credit card needed. Choose your topics, practice with AI, and when you're ready pick a plan with a 5-day trial included.

mobile.title: Practice from any device
mobile.subtitle: tlahtolli.ai works right in your phone and computer browser. No need to install anything to start practicing.
mobile.desktopDesc: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge. Full experience with no downloads or extensions.
mobile.mobileDesc: Open tlahtolli.ai from your phone's browser. Responsive design that adapts to any screen.
mobile.appDesc: We're building an app for iOS and Android with the same experience as the browser. Coming soon.
